formulas.name: Vital Capacity
formulas.formula: Tidal Volume (TV) x Number of Respiratory Cycles per minute
formulas.variables: TV: Tidal Volume, Respiratory Cycles: Number of breaths taken in one minute
formulas.notes: Calculates the maximum volume of air that can be exhaled after maximum inhalation

formulas.name: Functional Residual Capacity (FRC)
formulas.variables: ERV: Expiratory Reserve Volume, TV: Tidal Volume
formulas.notes: Calculates the volume of air remaining in lungs after normal exhalation

formulas.name: Residual Volume (RV)
formulas.formula: RV = Total Lung Capacity (TLC) - Expiratory Reserve Volume (ERV)
formulas.variables: TLC: Total Lung Capacity, ERV: Expiratory Reserve Volume
formulas.notes: Calculates the volume of air remaining in lungs after maximum exhalation

formulas.name: Hill's Criteria for the Diagnosis of Malaria
formulas.formula: Asexual and sexual stages in peripheral blood, presence of malarial pigment in RBCs, and/or malarial parasitemia in bone marrow
formulas.variables: Asymptomatic and symptomatic stages, presence of parasite stages, malarial pigment in RBCs
formulas.notes: A set of criteria used for the diagnosis of malaria
